import React from 'react'; import './Projects.css'; const PROJECTS = [ { id: 1, title: 'Mark Cuban - Billionaire Journey', category: 'YouTube', year: '2024', desc: 'Long-form documentary edit, 2.1M views', accent: 'var(--blue)', accentSoft: 'rgba(67, 97, 238, 0.42)', }, { id: 2, title: 'Brand Anthem - Nike India', category: 'Commercial', year: '2024', desc: '60s brand spot, color graded in DaVinci', accent: 'var(--pink)', accentSoft: 'rgba(247, 37, 133, 0.42)', }, { id: 3, title: 'Afterglow - Music Video', category: 'Music Video', year: '2023', desc: 'Cinematic MV, 540K views on YouTube', accent: 'var(--lavender)', accentSoft: 'rgba(123, 94, 167, 0.42)', }, { id: 4, title: 'Delwinder - Sports Doc', category: 'Documentary', year: '2024', desc: '10-min sports documentary, film festivals', accent: 'var(--blue)', accentSoft: 'rgba(67, 97, 238, 0.42)', }, { id: 5, title: 'Post Breakup Emotions', category: 'Short Film', year: '2023', desc: 'Narrative short, festival circuit', accent: 'var(--pink)', accentSoft: 'rgba(247, 37, 133, 0.42)', }, { id: 6, title: 'Finance Creator Package', category: 'YouTube', year: '2024', desc: 'Ongoing editing for 920K subscriber channel', accent: 'var(--lavender)', accentSoft: 'rgba(123, 94, 167, 0.42)', }, ]; export default function Projects() { return (

Selected Work

A few things I've crafted recently.

{PROJECTS.map((project) => (
{project.category}

{project.title}

{project.desc}

{project.year} ↗
))}
); }
